Game.Name: Caravan Shooting Collection (Japan) (En)
Game.plot: Caravan Shooting Collection is an Action game, developed and published by Hudson,which was released in Japan in 1995.Cheat: Invincibility (Star Force)At title screen, press and hold Up, Right, A & B on the 2nd controller. While holding those buttons, press and hold Up, Left, Y & B on the 1st controller and press Start. If done right, you should be invincible.
Game.Notes: Caravan Shooting Collection for the SNES is a collection of 3 shmups that were the games in the 1985-1987 caravan festivals called Star Force, Star Soldier and Hector '87 respectively. These games are reproduced on the SNES but take advantage of the extra power of the console to tidy up some problems that the old NES had.
